name: ds-slot-violation
description: Stage 4 / M3 fixture: the 'icon' slot disallows all elements ([] means text only), but a rendered probe would insert a disallowed element to verify the component's connectedCallback fires a console error. Rendered slot probing requires a live headless tree (constraint-enforcement-spec.md Section 3, 'composition', rendered check) and is out of scope for M2.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Text/SVG reference only; no arbitrary elements.
